description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push to master and next branches and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow consists of multiple ubuntu-latest jobs for linting, documentation, mypy, and testing with different Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8) and fuzzing, each involving checking out the code, setting up Python, installing Tox, running Tox with specific environments, and uploading coverage to Codecov using a CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
